products.name: Chicken Curry Cut
products.description: Fresh, halal, skinless chicken cut into curry-sized pieces. Juicy & tender.

products.name: Chicken Breast Boneless
products.description: Tender and juicy boneless chicken breast. Cleaned and trimmed of fat.

products.name: Fresh Mutton Curry Cut
products.description: Premium quality tender halal goat meat, cut perfectly for curries and stews.

products.name: Mutton Minced (Keema)
products.description: Finely minced fresh halal mutton, perfect for kebab preparations and keema curry.

products.name: Premium Pomfret Medium
products.description: Freshly caught pomfret fish, clean gutted and ready to fry or grill.

products.name: Fresh Farm Eggs (Pack of 12)
products.description: High-protein, farm fresh brown eggs. Carefully sorted and safely packed.

products.name: Chicken Tikka Marinade
products.description: Halal chicken cubes marinated in premium curd and hot spices. Ready to grill.
